text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Tuesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, November 19. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Space science and tech is a great focus. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Let's break this down. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Understood. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Calculating some savings estimates. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Refinancing is a great leverage point. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. School projects are fun. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Staying active is key. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: I'm reviewing the patient onboarding specs for Vertex Health. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds critical. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Good focus area. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Reviewing our household budget today. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Budget tracking is updated. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. School projects are fun. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! I've logged your vitals. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Busy day at Vertex Health. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
